title: Tunnel worm (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tunnel worm''' was the name of a number of species.

*A [[Tunnel worm (Tasariq)|species]] native to [[Tasariq]].
*A [[Tunnel worm (Selonia)|species]] native to [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]].
*A [[Tunnel worm (Kathol Rift)|bio-engineered species]] in the [[Kathol Rift/Legends|Kathol Rift]].
{{Disambig}}
